title: Bee Removal Edison, NJ | Professional Bee Control Services $350-$550
metaDescription: Professional bee removal services in Edison, NJ from $350-$550. Safe, effective bee control for residential and commercial properties. Licensed experts serving Edison.
intro: Edison, New Jersey residents facing bee infestations need swift, professional intervention to protect their families and properties. Our expert bee removal services safely eliminate bee colonies from homes, businesses, and outdoor spaces throughout Edison. With pricing ranging from $350 to $550, we provide affordable, effective solutions tailored to your specific situation.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC brings over a decade of experience serving the Edison community with humane, environmentally responsible bee removal techniques. Our licensed technicians respond quickly, use specialized equipment to safely relocate or remove bee colonies, and provide follow-up inspections to ensure your property remains bee-free.
localContext: Edison's mix of suburban homes, the Menlo Park Mall area, and historic neighborhoods like Clara Barton present unique challenges for bee control, from attic infestations in ranch-style homes to bee colonies in commercial properties along Route 1. Our team understands the specific architecture and landscape features of Edison properties, ensuring effective bee removal whether you're near Roosevelt Park or in the Oak Tree Road business district.

faqs.question: How much does bee removal cost in Edison, NJ?
faqs.answer: Bee removal services in Edison typically range from $350 to $550, depending on the size and location of the colony, accessibility, and whether the hive is in a wall, attic, or outdoor area. We provide free inspections and upfront pricing before beginning any work.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove bees from my Edison property?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day service for most Edison locations. Emergency bee removal is available for situations involving aggressive swarms or nests near entryways. Our typical bee removal process takes 1-3 hours depending on colony size and location.

faqs.question: Do you relocate bees or exterminate them?
faqs.answer: Whenever possible, we humanely relocate honeybee colonies to local beekeepers who can care for them properly. For aggressive Africanized bees or situations where relocation isn't feasible, we use targeted removal methods. We always prioritize environmentally responsible solutions that protect beneficial pollinators.

faqs.question: Will bees return after removal?
faqs.answer: Our comprehensive bee removal service includes complete hive and honeycomb removal to prevent attracting new colonies. We also seal entry points and apply preventative treatments to discourage future bee activity. All our Edison bee removal services include a warranty to ensure the problem doesn't return.
